description: Public hint for a Pulse server that can host room signaling and local authorization.

main.description: A server-owned public hint that lets clients discover where to connect for Pulse app APIs. It does not grant access to private rooms.

serviceDid.description: DID for the Pulse server or service account publishing this hint.

baseUrl.description: HTTPS origin for Pulse app APIs and WebRTC signaling.

createdAt.description: Record creation time in RFC 3339 format.

updatedAt.description: Last meaningful server metadata update time.

policyUrl.description: Optional public moderation or acceptable-use policy URL.
